LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WORLD SAVINGS BANK, FSB'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SATISFY THE COURT'S REQUIREMENT THAT HE AMEND BY ATTACHING THE CONTRACT OR PLEADING IT'S TERMS SPECIFICALLY. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS BY ATTACHING THE CONTRACT AS AN EXHIBIT OR BY PLEADING THE SPECIFIC LANGUAGE OF THE MATERIAL TERMS. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Full And Complete Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One; Requests For Admission, Set One; Request For Sanctions Against Deft World Savings Bank, Fsb
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Mark Hooshmand, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Rudy Colombini
Walt Traver, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: World Savings Bank

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Rudy Colombini's Motion To Compel Full And Complete Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One; Requests For Admission, Set One, is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Counsel must meet and confer about any remaining claims of inadequacy of the supplemental responses. However, counsel are advised that the objections that remain would not be sustained, except for claims of attorney client and work product privilege. Any documents withheld on a claim of privilege must be identified with particularity. All responses must comply with all of the provisions of C.C.P. Section 2031.230.
The court finds that the initial responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $1,100, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
MARK HOOSHMAND, 863-2345, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY
WALT TRAVER FROM MUSICK, PEELER & GARRETT LLP, 281-2022, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY

ARGUED AND The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WORLD SAVINGS BANK, FSB's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SATISFY THE COURT'S REQUIREMENT THAT HE AMEND BY ATTACHING THE CONTRACT OR PLEADING IT'S TERMS SPECIFICALLY. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH ONE LAST OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS BY ATTACHING THE CONTRACT AS AN EXHIBIT OR BY PLEADING THE SPECIFIC LANGUAGE OF THE MATERIAL TERMS. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
